message: The SWPC (Space Weather Prediction Center) has issued a G3 (Strong) Geomagnetic Storm WATCH for Thu, Jun 4 & Fri, Jun 5 (UTC). Moderate-Strong Geomagnetic Storming is possible. https://www.swpc.noaa.gov/products/alerts-watches-and-warnings
The ongoing S4 Severe Radiation Storm is resulting in unreliable solar wind data. Please use data with caution.

We'll be performing routine server maintenance on Tuesday, March 24th at ~10:00am CT. During this time you may experience intermittent disruptions in accessing the site, check the WTUS Twitter for updates.
